events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need parse scenario: Lockout/Tagout, production floor, observed condition: no try-step verification (SEQ). Work actively in progress. Need identify hazards, severity, immediate controls. Decision fail because dangerous/non-compliant. Risk high or critical? LOTO without verification can lead to unexpected energization, serious injury/fatality. Critical maybe. Work stage in-progress. Component conditions: non-compliant (LOTO procedure missing verification), installed-defective? Could be non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 50? value not asked, leave 0. sound_source etc default empty string/0. workable empty list. findings: no try-step verification performed; stored/residual energy not verified; equipment may still be energized; worker exposure to hazardous energy. actions: stop work; apply lockout/tagout devices; perform try-step verification per OSHA; verify zero energy state; test startup/interlock; train workers; document procedure. references: OSHA 1910.147(c)(4), (d), (f). Need valid JSON.
